# flashblade_array_ntp (Data Source)

Reads the current NTP server configuration of a FlashBlade array.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "flashblade_array_ntp" "example" {}

output "ntp_servers" {
  value = data.flashblade_array_ntp.example.ntp_servers
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the array.
- `ntp_servers` (List of String) List of NTP server hostnames or IP addresses.
